versions.changelog: Rendered landuse now resolves a wider OSM greenery palette (forest, wood, grass, meadow, cemetery, orchard, nature reserve, etc.) into the in-game park umbrella, so far more parkland, forest, and natural cover renders than in 0.1.x. Added hospital, port, convention / exhibition center, stadium and arena, and cultural-center demand. Multi-campus universities are now split across their campuses, attraction coverage expanded, and resident coverage restored for newly created villages.
Improved coastline accuracy and inland water/river representation, fixed neighbouring-city label bleed, and refined origin/destination commute distribution.
